mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company_members (company_id, user_id, role_id, invited_by, joined_at, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{userId}, #{roleId}, #{invitedBy}, #{joinedAt}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM company_members WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM company_members WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY joined_at ASC
SELECT * FROM company_members WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM company_members WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_members WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
